nodes.label: s_valid
nodes.direction: input // active-low, async assert / sync deassert // Ingress - message body stream (CONTRACT_TX_INTAKE)

nodes.label: s_last
nodes.direction: input // body byte; first body byte is MCTP type/IC byte (opaque)

nodes.label: s_empty
nodes.direction: input // final body byte of the message

nodes.label: s_dest_eid
nodes.direction: input // caller aborts in-flight message -> underrun

nodes.label: s_ready
nodes.direction: output // tag owner bit, latched at message start

nodes.label: m_valid
nodes.direction: output // DUT accepts a body beat // Egress - MCTP packet stream (CONTRACT_TX_HEADER / FRAGMENT / SOM_EOM / SEQNUM)

nodes.label: m_sop
nodes.direction: output // 4 header bytes then payload bytes

nodes.label: m_eop
nodes.direction: output // header byte 0 of each packet

nodes.label: m_ready
nodes.direction: input // final byte of each packet

nodes.label: psel
nodes.direction: input // sink ready; low -> stall without losing data // CSR - APB-lite, single clock, zero-wait (CONTRACT_TX_STATUS)

nodes.label: pwdata
nodes.direction: input // pwdata is a 32-bit APB bus (frozen interface); the widest CSR field is // MAX_MSG[15:0], so pwdata[31:16] is intentionally unused. Waive only this // signal's unused-bits warning (not a real issue; the port width is fixed). /* verilator lint_off UNUSEDSIGNAL */

nodes.label: irq_err
nodes.direction: output // 1-cycle pulse on EOM packet egress completion
